notes: Sprint 7 starter set — 3 pairs covering question/interested/opt_out. Expand to 15 before production rollout per sprint-7-implementation-plan.md Phase 7.0.1.

inbound.subject: Re: quick question about TaggIQ
inbound.body_text: Hi Prakash, this sounds interesting. What's the pricing for a team of 4?
inbound.context_notes: Existing TaggIQ trial user, high intent

ideal_reply.body_text: Hi Julie, good to hear from you. I'd rather not quote pricing by email - it depends on which modules you use and how often. Easier to cover it live in 15 minutes. Here's my calendar: https://calendar.app.google/fzQ5iQLGHakimfjv7 - pick any slot that works. Prakash
ideal_reply.voice_notes: Short, conversational, deflects pricing, offers calendar, first-name sign-off, no em dashes

axes.factual_accuracy: must NOT quote a price, must offer call/demo

inbound.subject: Re: 3-minute quote
inbound.body_text: Looks useful. Can we see it in action? We do a lot of embroidered polos and always chasing decoration options manually.
inbound.context_notes: TaggIQ Ireland - Apparel & Embroidery campaign, existing prospect

ideal_reply.body_text: Cian, perfect fit - decoration options pulled straight from supplier catalogs is exactly what we built for shops doing embroidery at volume. I can run you through it on a 20-minute call with real data. Calendar here: https://calendar.app.google/fzQ5iQLGHakimfjv7. If easier, reply with a time that suits and I'll confirm. Prakash
ideal_reply.voice_notes: Picks up on their specific pain (embroidery decoration), offers live demo, two paths to book

axes.factual_accuracy: decoration options ARE a real TaggIQ feature

inbound.subject: Re: quick intro
inbound.body_text: Please remove me from your list. Not interested.

ideal_reply.body_note: Terminal — no reply sent. Rules engine transitions status to opted_out + adds to Suppression (product-scoped). This pair tests that the system CORRECTLY sends nothing.
ideal_reply.voice_notes: The right action here is silence + suppression, not a reply
